question: Chapters
feedback: The text identifies the two main parts of the thesis – the theoretical and practical sections – and outlines three sub‑sections within the theoretical part. This meets the requirement of listing the main sections.

question: Description
feedback: The description covers the content of the three sub‑sections of the theoretical part, but it omits any description of the practical part. Because it does not provide a brief overview of all sections, it does not fully satisfy the requirement.

question: Structure
feedback: Readers can quickly grasp that the thesis is organized into two major parts, with the theoretical part further divided into three sub‑sections. This provides a clear overall structure, so the requirement is met.
